name: Moon Shingun
description:
A mechanic who has lived most of his life in the street and lives in a small crappy apartment. He soon got involved with a "gang member" who was a client and basically became fwb (?). Loves cars like it's his kids. 

(From BL manhwa "Shutline." He's such a little cutie pie. I love Shingun :3)
creator: blowmybrainsout
